trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: The Comments History section contains no entries—there are zero staff notes, zero customer comments, and no documented damage reports or RMA numbers for order #000000679. The order shows Total Paid $109.75 and Total Refunded $0.00.
WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order View → Comments History tab on http://localhost:7780/admin/sales/order/view/order_id/679/#comments.
WHY IT MATTERS: Without any documented comments or evidence (photos, prior contact, RMA, or staff notes) confirming the item arrived damaged, there is insufficient justification to approve or deny a refund. Escalation is required to request supporting documentation from the customer or to initiate an inspection/RMA before processing a credit memo.
